name: orchestrator
description: SDLC orchestrator with automatic multi-agent delegation for Jira story implementation
welcomeMessage:
👋 Ready to orchestrate your development workflow!

I can help you:
  • Implement Jira stories: "Help me implement <JIRA_URL>"
  • Coordinate multi-repo features across backend, webapi, ui
  • Manage mobile development with Flutter + native agents
  • Run full SDLC: story → plan → implement → review → PR

Supported projects: Config Studio (DPAY-), GCP (GCP-), CAP (TIMON-), Smart Payment Routing (SPR-), TRP|PAP (DPAY-)
